candidate_summary: Coolest Cooler 2014 Kickstarter; most-funded Kickstarter of 2014 — then a notorious fulfillment failure.
observed_outcome_summary: Raised $13,285,226 from 62,642 backers (ended Aug 2014). The company shut down in Dec 2019 with MORE THAN 20,000 of 62,642 backers never receiving a cooler — a documented case where a large buyer-action signal did NOT convert to a delivered/satisfied outcome.
raw_outcome_evidence: Wikipedia 'Coolest Cooler', verbatim: 'ended the campaign in August with $13,285,226 and 62,642 backers, making it the most-funded Kickstarter campaign of 2014.' and 'More than 20,000 backers who didn't receive a cooler were told they could claim $20 back ...' Shutdown Dec 2019. (Operator-fetched 2026-05-31.)

action_signal_candidates.notes: 62,642 backers; $13,285,226 pledged. Tier-1 buyer action at pledge time.
>20,000 backers never received product before 2019 shutdown — negative downstream outcome (fulfillment failure / effective churn).

reviewer_notes: Recommended evidence_tier=1. HIGH-VALUE negative-outcome case: strong buyer-action then fulfillment collapse. Recommended designation: TRAINING. Human should weigh how to represent the >32% non-fulfilled buyers.
uncertainty_flags: self_selected_denominator: backers/users are self-selected; the receptive/uncertain/skeptical proportions of the FULL addressable market are NOT externally observable
buyer_numerator_only: the action signal gives the buyer/action-positive count, not a four-bucket distribution
downstream_fulfillment_failure: >20,000 of 62,642 backers never received the product (company shut down 2019)
realized_buyers_below_pledged: refund/non-delivery means delivered buyers < pledged backers
